knowledge.insight: Robertson: On TVA (Tennessee Valley Authority) lakes in summer, you have no choice but to fish offshore. You come to the TVA in the summer, you better get off the bank.
Robertson: On offshore ledges, you won't get a lot of bites, but figuring out one or two little things to trigger bigger bites can make the difference. It's about quality over quantity.
Robertson: On ledge fisheries, rotate through multiple spots rather than hammering one area. This keeps the fish from getting too pressured and ensures fresh opportunities throughout the day.
